notes: Hand-labeled ground truth. v0.2 needs a second annotator + Cohen's kappa.

ground_truth.claim: Dashboards with many charts load very slowly
Billing is confusing and the breakdown doesn't tie out to the app
Salesforce sync silently fails without notification
Considering switching to a competitor due to speed and pricing
Filtering UI is confusing — multiple filter types behave differently
Easy to show wrong numbers because chart-level filters are forgotten
Mobile dashboard view is unusable — charts overlap and don't load
Product feels slow and brittle
Dashboard load times are bad once you have many charts
Per-query pricing is not visible upfront and surprises customers
No in-product way to comment or annotate charts for the team
Salesforce sync is unreliable and silently fails weekly
Filter UI is buried and hard to find
No in-context help or tooltips for occasional users
Alerts and dashboards show inconsistent values, possibly timezone-related
User has lost trust in the data and double-checks against source spreadsheets
Datadog connector is incomplete — pulls metrics but not events
Product feedback loop is opaque — feature requests get no follow-up
Role-based permissions are too coarse-grained
Migration cost (200 dashboards) locks them in despite friction
